301.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked about Safiyyah and was told she had started her menses. He said: 'Is she going to delay us?' They said: 'O Messenger of Allah, she has already performed the Tawaf al-Ifadah.' He said: 'Then there is no problem.'
301.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya tentang Shafiyyah dan diberitahu bahwa ia sedang haid. Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah ia akan menahan kita?' Mereka berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ia sudah melakukan Tawaf Ifadhah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu tidak ada masalah.'

302.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a state of ihram for Hajj.'
302.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami keluar bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam keadaan berihram untuk haji.'

303.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'It is as if I can still see the gleam of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was reciting the talbiyah.'
303.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seakan-akan aku masih bisa melihat kilau wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau mengucapkan talbiyah.'

304.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I perfumed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with these two hands of mine when he entered the state of ihram.'
304.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ dengan kedua tanganku ini ketika beliau memasuki keadaan ihram.'

305.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I perfumed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with the best perfume I could find.'
305.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ dengan wewangian terbaik yang bisa aku temukan.'

306.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding the meat of Barirah: 'For her it is charity, and for us it is a gift.'
306.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai daging Barirah: 'Baginya itu adalah sedekah, dan bagi kami itu adalah hadiah.'

307.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say: 'O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the Fire, the trial of the Fire, the trial of the grave, and the punishment of the grave; from the evil trial of wealth, the evil trial of poverty, and the evil trial of the Antichrist. O Allah, cleanse my sins with water, snow, and hail.'
307.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mengucapkan: 'Ya Allah, aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari azab neraka, fitnah neraka, fitnah kubur, dan azab kubur; dari keburukan fitnah kekayaan, keburukan fitnah kemiskinan, dan keburukan fitnah Al-Masih Dajjal. Ya Allah, bersihkanlah dosa-dosaku dengan air, salju, dan hujan es.'

308.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever loves to meet Allah, Allah loves to meet him. And whoever hates to meet Allah, Allah hates to meet him. And death comes before the meeting with Allah.'
308.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barang siapa yang mencintai pertemuan dengan Allah, Allah pun mencintai pertemuan dengannya. Dan barang siapa yang membenci pertemuan dengan Allah, Allah pun membenci pertemuan dengannya. Kematian datang sebelum pertemuan dengan Allah.'

309.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The bed of the Prophet ﷺ was made of leather stuffed with palm fiber.'
309.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tempat tidur Nabi ﷺ terbuat dari kulit yang diisi dengan serat pelepah kurma.'

310.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about fasting during travel by a man who fasted continuously. She said the Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied: 'The choice is yours — if you wish, fast; and if you wish, break your fast.'
310.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang puasa dalam perjalanan oleh seorang laki-laki yang berpuasa secara terus-menerus. Ia berkata bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menjawab: 'Pilihan ada padamu — jika kamu mau, berpuasalah; dan jika kamu mau, berbukalah.'

311.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked: 'Do you have anything?' She said: 'No.' He said: 'Then I am fasting.' Then on another day she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, a dish of hays was given to us as a gift and we set some aside for you.' He said: 'Bring it here. I had begun the day fasting.' Then he ate.
311.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah kalian punya sesuatu?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu aku berpuasa.' Kemudian pada hari lain ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, kami diberi hadiah semangkuk hays dan kami menyimpan sebagian untukmu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bawa kemari. Aku memulai hari ini dalam keadaan berpuasa.' Lalu beliau memakannya.

312.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ kissed one of his wives while he was fasting, and then she laughed.
312.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mencium salah satu istrinya sementara beliau sedang berpuasa, lalu ia pun tertawa.

313.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you eats food, let him say Bismillah. If he forgets at the beginning, let him say: Bismillah at its beginning and its end.'
313.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian makan, hendaklah ia mengucapkan Bismillah. Jika ia lupa di awalnya, hendaklah ia mengucapkan: Bismillah di awalnya dan di akhirnya.'

314.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ had a striped garment and its pattern would catch his attention during prayer. He gave it to Abu Jahm and took from him a plain woolen garment.
314.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memiliki kain bergaris-garis dan motifnya mengalihkan perhatian beliau saat shalat. Beliau memberikannya kepada Abu Jahm dan mengambil dari padanya kain wol polos.

315.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she used to comb the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while she was menstruating.
315.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia biasa menyisir rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara ia sedang haid.

316.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he would drape them around the animals and then send them off.'
316.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa menganyam kalung untuk hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ, lalu beliau mengalungkannya pada hewan-hewan tersebut dan mengirimnya.'

317.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ once sent sheep as sacrificial animals with garlands around their necks.
317.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pernah mengirimkan kambing sebagai hewan kurban dengan kalung di lehernya.

318.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever vows to disobey Allah must not disobey Him.'
318.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barang siapa yang bernazar untuk bermaksiat kepada Allah, maka janganlah ia bermaksiat kepada-Nya.'

319.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave permission for the use of incantation against every venomous creature.'
319.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan izin untuk menggunakan ruqyah terhadap setiap makhluk berbisa.'

320.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to say when visiting the sick: "Remove the affliction, O Lord of mankind — in Your hand is the cure. There is none to remove it but You."'
320.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa mengucapkan ketika mengunjungi orang sakit: "Hilangkanlah penyakit ini, wahai Tuhan sekalian manusia — di tangan-Mu kesembuhan. Tidak ada yang dapat menghilangkannya kecuali Engkau."'

321.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, tell me — if I happen upon the Night of Power, what should I supplicate?' He said: 'Say: O Allah, You are the Pardoner, You love pardon, so pardon me.'
321.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, beritahulah aku — jika aku menjumpai Lailatul Qadar, apa yang harus aku doakan?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ucapkanlah: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya Engkau Maha Pemaaf, Engkau mencintai maaf, maka maafkanlah aku.'

322.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was present at the funeral of a boy from the Ansar and she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, how blessed this one is — a little bird from the birds of Paradise who has not reached the age of wrongdoing nor committed any.' He said: 'Or it may be otherwise, O Aisha. Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, created people for Paradise and created them for it while they were still in the loins of their fathers. And He created people for the Fire and created them for it while they were still in the loins of their fathers.'
322.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia hadir pada jenazah seorang bocah dari Anshar dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, alangkah beruntungnya ia — burung kecil dari burung-burung surga yang belum mencapai usia kemaksiatan dan belum melakukan kejahatan apa pun.' Beliau bersabda: 'Atau mungkin sebaliknya, wahai Aisyah. Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung menciptakan manusia untuk surga dan menciptakan mereka untuknya sementara mereka masih dalam tulang sulbi ayah-ayah mereka. Dan Dia menciptakan manusia untuk neraka dan menciptakan mereka untuknya sementara mereka masih dalam tulang sulbi ayah-ayah mereka.'

323.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the children of the polytheists. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If you wish, I will let you hear their wailing in the Fire.'
323.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang anak-anak kaum musyrik. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika kamu mau, aku akan memperdengarkan kepadamu ratapan mereka di neraka.'

324.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ returned from a journey and found a curtain hanging at her door with images of winged horses on it — and he tore it down.
324.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ kembali dari perjalanan dan mendapati tirai bergambar kuda bersayap tergantung di pintunya — lalu beliau merobeknya.

325.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ruled that the earnings of a slave belong to whoever bears the liability for him — meaning that if a slave is purchased and found to have a defect after his earnings had been collected, the earnings belong to the buyer who bore the risk.
325.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memutuskan bahwa penghasilan seorang budak adalah milik orang yang menanggung risikonya — artinya jika seorang budak dibeli dan ternyata memiliki cacat setelah penghasilannya dikumpulkan, penghasilan tersebut menjadi milik pembeli yang menanggung risiko.

326.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'Jibril conveys greetings of peace to you.' She replied: 'And upon him be peace and the mercy of Allah.'
326.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Jibril menyampaikan salam kepadamu.' Ia menjawab: 'Dan atasnya pula salam dan rahmat Allah.'

327.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'What makes my name lawful yet makes my kunya forbidden — or what makes my kunya forbidden yet makes my name lawful?' — meaning it is not permissible to combine both the name Muhammad and the kunya Abu al-Qasim.
327.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apa yang membuat namaku halal namun membuat kuniyahku haram — atau apa yang membuat kuniyahku haram namun membuat namaku halal?' — maksudnya tidak diperbolehkan menggabungkan nama Muhammad dan kuniyah Abu al-Qasim sekaligus.

328.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'None of you should say: "my soul has become foul" (khabuthat nafsi). Instead he should say: "my soul feels nauseous" (laqisat nafsi).' Waki' said: meaning disgust.
328.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah salah seorang dari kalian berkata: "jiwaku menjadi kotor" (khabuthat nafsi). Sebaliknya hendaklah ia berkata: "jiwaku merasa mual" (laqisat nafsi).' Waki' berkata: yakni rasa jijik.

329.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray on a small prayer mat.
329.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat di atas sajadah kecil.

330.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to instruct me to put on a waist-wrap when I was menstruating, and then he would engage in intimate contact with me.'
330.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memerintahku untuk mengenakan kain pinggang ketika aku sedang haid, lalu beliau bercumbu denganku.'

331.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The family of Muhammad ﷺ never had wheat bread for more than three consecutive days. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only prohibited keeping sacrificial meat beyond three days because of the hardship the people faced at the time. Then later he allowed it.'
331.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Keluarga Muhammad ﷺ tidak pernah memiliki roti gandum lebih dari tiga hari berturut-turut. Rasulullah ﷺ hanya melarang menyimpan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari karena kesulitan yang dialami orang-orang saat itu. Kemudian beliau mengizinkannya kembali.'

332.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to perfume the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he entered the state of ihram with the best perfume I could find — until I could see the gleam of the perfume in his head and beard.'
332.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau memasuki keadaan ihram dengan wewangian terbaik yang bisa aku temukan — hingga aku bisa melihat kilau wewangian itu di kepala dan janggutnya.'

333.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'The snake is wicked, the scorpion is wicked, the crow is wicked, and the mouse is wicked' — meaning they may be killed.
333.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Ular itu fasiq, kalajengking itu fasiq, gagak itu fasiq, dan tikus itu fasiq' — artinya mereka boleh dibunuh.

334.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she corrected the understanding that the deceased is punished because of the weeping of the living. She said: 'What Ibn Umar has erred in, he also erred in on the day of the Qalyub well. What the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said is: "He is being punished while his family weeps over him" — meaning an unbeliever.'
334.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengoreksi pemahaman bahwa orang yang meninggal dihukum karena tangisan orang-orang yang hidup. Ia berkata: 'Apa yang Ibnu Umar keliru padanya, ia juga keliru padanya pada hari sumur Qalyub. Yang dikatakan Rasulullah ﷺ adalah: "Ia sedang diazab sementara keluarganya menangisinya" — maksudnya orang kafir.'

335.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Barirah was a slave who had a contract of emancipation, and her husband was also a slave. When she was emancipated, she was given the choice.
335.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Barirah adalah seorang budak yang memiliki akad pembebasan, dan suaminya juga seorang budak. Ketika ia dimerdekakan, ia diberi pilihan.

336.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was given a choice between two things, he always chose the easier of the two — as long as it was not sinful.'
336.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ diberi pilihan antara dua hal, beliau selalu memilih yang lebih mudah di antara keduanya — selama itu bukan dosa.'

337.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she noticed the Prophet ﷺ was absent from his bed. She felt around for him and found him in prostration, saying: 'O Lord, grant my soul its piety; purify it — You are the best of those who purify it. You are its Guardian and its Master.'
337.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendapati Nabi ﷺ tidak ada di tempat tidurnya. Ia meraba-raba dan mendapati beliau dalam keadaan sujud, mengucapkan: 'Wahai Tuhanku, anugerahkanlah pada jiwaku ketakwaannya; sucikanlah ia — Engkau adalah sebaik-baik yang mensucikannya. Engkau adalah pelindungnya dan tuannya.'

338.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The family of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a wild animal in the house. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would go out, it would run about and play in the house. When he returned, it would become still and not move, as if unwilling to disturb him.'
338.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Keluarga Rasulullah ﷺ memiliki hewan liar di rumah. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ keluar, ia berlari-lari dan bermain di dalam rumah. Ketika beliau masuk, ia berdiam diri dan tidak bergerak, seolah tidak mau mengganggunya.'

339.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray the Duha prayer voluntarily, but I do pray it.'
339.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak shalat Dhuha secara sukarela, namun aku shalat Dhuha.'

340.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she addressed women, saying: 'Beware of scraping the face.' A woman asked her about dyeing the hair, and she replied: 'There is nothing wrong with dyeing, but I dislike it because my beloved ﷺ disliked its smell.'
340.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada para wanita: 'Berhati-hatilah kalian dari mengikir wajah.' Seorang wanita bertanya tentang mewarnai rambut, dan ia menjawab: 'Tidak ada masalah dengan mewarnai, namun aku tidak menyukainya karena kekasihku ﷺ tidak menyukai aromanya.'

341.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I said: Abu Bakr is a tender-hearted man — whenever he stands in your place, he weeps and cannot be heard by the people. If only you would command Umar to pray with the people.' He said: 'Command Abu Bakr to lead the people in prayer.' We said: 'O Messenger of Allah, Abu Bakr is a soft-hearted man — whenever he stands in your place he weeps and cannot be heard. If only you would command Umar.' He said: 'Command Abu Bakr — indeed you women are like the companions of Yusuf.' So we sent for Abu Bakr and he led the people in prayer. The Prophet ﷺ then felt some ease and came out, supported between two men.',
341.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berkata: Abu Bakar adalah seorang yang lembut hatinya — setiap kali ia berdiri di tempatmu, ia menangis dan tidak bisa didengar orang-orang. Seandainya saja engkau memerintahkan Umar untuk shalat bersama orang-orang.' Beliau bersabda: 'Perintahkan Abu Bakar untuk mengimami orang-orang dalam shalat.' Kami berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Abu Bakar adalah orang yang lembut hatinya — setiap kali ia berdiri di tempatmu ia menangis dan tidak bisa didengar. Seandainya saja engkau memerintahkan Umar.' Beliau bersabda: 'Perintahkan Abu Bakar — sesungguhnya kalian wanita seperti para sahabat Yusuf.' Maka kami mengirim untuk Abu Bakar dan ia mengimami orang-orang dalam shalat. Kemudian Nabi ﷺ merasakan sedikit keringanan dan keluar, dipapah di antara dua orang.'

342.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ washed his private parts three times.
342.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mencuci kemaluannya tiga kali.

343.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved to begin from the right in his ablution, his combing, and his putting on shoes.
343.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyukai memulai dari sisi kanan dalam berwudhu, menyisir rambut, dan memakai sandal.

344.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to bathe with the Prophet ﷺ from a single vessel when we were both in a state of ritual impurity.'
344.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mandi bersama Nabi ﷺ dari satu bejana ketika kami berdua dalam keadaan junub.'

345.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to drink while I was menstruating, then I would hand it to the Prophet ﷺ and he would place his mouth at the spot where I had drunk. And I used to gnaw at a bone while menstruating, then hand it to the Prophet ﷺ and he would place his mouth at the spot where I had gnawed.'
345.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa minum sementara aku sedang haid, lalu aku menyerahkannya kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau meletakkan mulutnya di tempat yang sama dengan tempatku minum. Dan aku biasa menggerogoti tulang sementara aku sedang haid, lalu menyerahkannya kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau meletakkan mulutnya di tempat yang sama dengan tempatku menggerogoti.'

346.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ kissed one of his wives and then went out to pray without performing ablution. Urwa said: I said to her: 'It must have been you.' She laughed.
346.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mencium salah satu istrinya lalu keluar untuk shalat tanpa berwudhu. Urwah berkata: Aku berkata kepadanya: 'Pasti itu adalah engkau.' Ia pun tertawa.

347.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ kissed and then prayed without performing ablution.
347.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mencium lalu shalat tanpa berwudhu.

348.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A baby boy was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and urinated on him. He poured water over it without washing it thoroughly.'
348.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang bayi laki-laki dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ lalu kencing di atasnya. Beliau menuangkan air di atasnya tanpa mencucinya secara menyeluruh.'

349.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Khawla bint Hakim came to an elderly man to propose marriage to him on behalf of the Prophet ﷺ. He asked about the matter, and when told of the proposal, he said: 'A noble match. What does your companion say?' She said: 'She is willing.' He said: 'Call her to me.' Aisha later narrated: He said to her: 'O daughter, this woman claims that Muhammad ibn Abd Allah has sent her to propose marriage to you.'
349.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Khawlah binti Hakim datang kepada seorang laki-laki tua untuk melamarkan pernikahan kepadanya atas nama Nabi ﷺ. Ia bertanya tentang perkara itu, dan ketika diberitahu tentang lamaran itu, ia berkata: 'Pasangan yang mulia. Apa kata temanmu?' Ia berkata: 'Ia bersedia.' Ia berkata: 'Panggillah ia kepadaku.' Aisyah kemudian menceritakan: Ia berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai putriku, wanita ini mengklaim bahwa Muhammad bin Abd Allah telah mengutusnya untuk melamarmu.'

350.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the verse of choice was revealed to her — 'If you desire the life of this world and its adornment, then come, I will provide for you and release you in a gracious manner. But if you desire Allah and His Messenger and the Home of the Hereafter, then indeed Allah has prepared for the doers of good among you a great reward' (33:28-29). She said: 'I desire Allah and His Messenger and the Home of the Hereafter. I will not consult my parents, Abu Bakr and Umm Ruman, in this matter.' The Prophet ﷺ then smiled and went through the other apartments.
350.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ayat pilihan diturunkan kepadanya — 'Jika kalian menginginkan kehidupan dunia dan perhiasannya, maka kemarilah, aku akan berikan kepada kalian dan aku akan lepaskan kalian dengan cara yang baik. Tetapi jika kalian menginginkan Allah dan Rasul-Nya dan negeri akhirat, maka sesungguhnya Allah telah menyediakan bagi orang-orang yang berbuat baik di antara kalian pahala yang besar' (33:28-29). Ia berkata: 'Aku menginginkan Allah dan Rasul-Nya dan negeri akhirat. Aku tidak akan berkonsultasi dengan orang tuaku, Abu Bakar dan Umm Ruman, dalam masalah ini.' Nabi ﷺ kemudian tersenyum dan mengunjungi kamar-kamar yang lain.
